untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of throwback/pullback patterns and gap presence on breakout day, which cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, etc.). These pattern-specific behaviors require custom pattern recognition logic beyond basic technical indicators. Additionally, no specific stop placement or target price computation rules are provided by the author.
translation_notes: Entry conditions simplified to basic breakout detection (close above/below previous bar). Exit conditions use reversal logic (close crossing back through entry bar). Hold period set to 11 days based on source data 'average time to throwback ends 11 days'. Performance metrics (33%-48% bull, 24%-25% bear) provided in signal but cannot be enforced as conditions. Gap detection and throwback identification require custom pattern logic not available in standard indicator set.
